zh.lifeSummary: 當Editha Laskin於1614年出生在英國多瑟特布洛阿德文德索時，她的父親Hugh Laskin11611歲，母親Alis24歲。她於1629年6月24日與Henry Herrick Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1677年3月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可索爾茲伯里享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Laskin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Nochum, Yitzchak, Yoav, Yochanan.
Russian and Belorussian: nickname from Russian and Belorussian laska ‘favor’, also ‘weasel’ + the possessive suffix -in.
Jewish (from Belarus): either of the same origin as 1 above, or from the personal name Laske, a pet form of the Biblical name Elazar (see Lazar ).

variants.name: Lazar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Moshe, Yonah, Amnon, Chaim, Ilanit, Naama, Naum, Shimon, Shira.

Jewish, Assyrian/Chaldean, German, Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian; Polish (also Łazar); Slovak (also Lazár and Lázár); Hungarian (Lázár); Romanian (Lazăr): from a Biblical personal name of Aramaic origin, a shortened form of the Hebrew name Elazar, composed of the elements El ‘God’ + azar ‘help’, and meaning ‘may God help him’ or ‘God has helped (i.e., by granting a son)’. This was established in central Europe as a Jewish name, but was also popular among Christians because it is recorded in the New Testament. Lazaros is the New Testament Greek form of the name of the brother of Martha and Mary, who was restored to life by Christ (John 11: 1–44). As a non-Jewish name it was also used as a nickname for a beggar or an outcast leper; this use arises from the parable of Dives and Lazarus (Luke 16: 19–31). In North America, this surname has also absorbed various other European cognates and their derivatives, e.g. Albanian Lazri, Lazëri, and Llazari (from the personal names Lazër and Llazar; see Lazer ), Greek patronymics like Lazarakis, Lazaridis , and Lazaropoulos, Serbian patronymic Lazarević (see Lazarevic ).

Slovenian: from lazar, a topographic name for someone who lived in an area of cleared woodland, itself derived from laz ‘cleared woodland’. Compare Austrian German and Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) Lasser 3 and Loser 3, and also Lazzari 2.

nameMeanings.name: Editha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Editha Laskin was born in 1614, in Broadwindsor, Dorset, England, her father, Hugh Laskin, was 11611 and her mother, Alis, was 24. She married Henry Herrick Sr on 24 June 1629, in Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 27 March 1677, in Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

ja.Leicester, Leicestershire, England: イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスター
ja.lifeSummary: Editha Laskinが1614年にイギリスドールセトブロアドウィンドソルで生まれた時，父Hugh Laskinは11611歳，母Alisは24歳であった。1629年6月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーサレムでHenry Herrick Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1677年3月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサリスブリーで63歳で死去した。

ko.Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘
ko.Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 살렘
ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살리스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Editha Laskin(이)가 1614년 영국 도르세트 브로드윈드소르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Laskin(은)는 11611세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alis(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1629년 6월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 살렘에서 Henry Herrick Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1677년 3월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살리스버이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Editha Laskin nasceu em 1614, em Broadwindsor, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Laskin, tinha 11611 anos e sua mãe, Alis, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Herrick Sr em 24 de junho de 1629, em Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1677, em Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Editha Laskin родилась в 1614 г. в местности броадвиндзор, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Laskin было 11611 год, а матери, которую звали Alis, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Herrick Sr 24 июня 1629 г. в местности сеилем, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 марта 1677 г. в местности салисбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Editha Laskin nació en 1614, en Broadwindsor, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Laskin, tenía 11611 años y su mamá, Alis, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Henry Herrick Sr el 24 de junio de 1629, en Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1677, en Salisbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
